title: Zira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zira, with a Z-Score of +5.26. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zira is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 17.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, and the wind speed is 8.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
